title: Tech-house single release campaign — FX streaming cover (duotone + Ben-Day halftone + glitch alt + film grain), colour-splash club promo photos, vectorized monochrome logo lockup, and Illustrator-merged tour-date merch/sticker cards
one_line_ask: Build the full release-art package for the tech-house single "NIGHTSHIFT": from the raw artist press/live photos and a supplied club-cover reference, deliver a 1600x1600 streaming cover with a duotone + Ben-Day halftone + brand-wash + film-grain treatment plus a VHS-glitch alt colourway, a set of artist promo photos depth-graded to a moody club look with a single magenta colour-splash accent, a vectorized monochrome logo lockup, and a print-ready batch of tour-date merch/sticker cards data-merged from a tour-dates CSV through a client-authored Illustrator Variables template.
deliverables: 1600x1600 streaming single cover (Apple Music/Spotify spec): hero promo frame rendered as a magenta/black duotone with a Ben-Day halftone screen, a brand-colour wash on multiply, and a film-grain finish
VHS-glitch alt colourway of the cover (chromatic-aberration glitch + added noise) for the visualiser/announce loop
A set of artist promo photos depth-graded to a consistent moody club look (subject popped off a soft-bokeh background, crushed blacks, neon cyan/magenta push)
A selective-colour / colour-splash treatment isolating one brand accent (magenta neon) on the promo photos, with everything else duotoned
A vectorized monochrome SVG logo lockup re-rendered to print-clean PNG/PDF for cover + merch use
A print-ready batch of tour-date merch / sticker cards (one per tour date) data-merged from the dates CSV via a client-authored Illustrator Variables .ai, exported as PDF + PNG
1600x1600 square + 1080x1920 story social crops of the finished cover for the release announce
source: Freelancer 'Tech House Single Cover' (verbatim brief, budget $30-250, skills Album Design/Illustrator/Photoshop) composed with Upwork album-art-package brief (id 1610320189970300928: album cover + social banner + promo image + promo video) per scraped pool — FX-heavy release-art bundle. Refined 2026-06-15 to confirmed connector feasibility: merch data-merge re-tagged [T] with a fully-authored Illustrator Variables template; promo-photo colour-splash chain split cleanly from the cover-FX chain; added glitch alt colourway, image_fill_area sticker backdrop, image_add_noise, and an Adobe Stock grain/neon plate to maximize distinct [C] tools and iterative chaining.
